metadata.description: Autonomous software engineering pipeline for Claude Code — 11 stages, 49 MCP tools, 64 verification rules

plugins.name: ai-architect
plugins.description: Autonomous software engineering pipeline built on Anthropic best practices. 11 pipeline stages (Stage 0 HealthCheck → Stage 10 PullRequest), 49 MCP tools, 64 HOR verification rules, 10 implemented algorithms (5 verification + 5 prompting). Skills define WHAT, tools define HOW, hooks enforce constraints.

plugins.name: ai-codebase-intelligence
plugins.description: Language-agnostic codebase intelligence engine — 17 MCP tools, tree-sitter parsing for 13 languages, typed Pydantic graph API, BM25 + RRF hybrid search, and 5 science-backed git analytics (ownership, bus factor, churn, cochange, dead code).
